description: InStreamCRM is a free CRM that centralizes contacts, social insights, and communications so sales teams can manage relationships and pipeline in one place.
tagline: Sales contact management and relationship automation tool
overview: InStream is a free CRM that centralizes contact records, pulls insights from social media, and streamlines team communication so sales teams can manage relationships and track pipeline activity in one place. It is well suited to small and medium businesses looking for fast, intuitive growth without heavy implementation costs.
what_is: InStream is a free online CRM designed for sales teams that want a simple, effective way to manage customer relationships. It centralizes contact data, gathers insights from social media profiles, and organizes communication history to help teams build stronger client connections. Users adopt it to create a consistent sales culture and improve team coordination through an intuitive dashboard.

The platform performs well for managing sales communications, organizing leads, and tracking customer interactions in a unified view. Because it automates data collection and surfaces real-time conversation history, teams can start realizing the benefits quickly and improve pipeline predictability without a long ramp-up period.

InStream integrates with Gmail, LinkedIn, Facebook, and Twitter to enrich contact records with social data and conversation context. It is not built for complex enterprise resource planning or large-scale marketing automation. For teams that want a straightforward, socially enriched CRM to strengthen sales relationships and accelerate growth, InStream is a practical choice.
